sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint says no orphan storage or DocumentReference records but does not define repair behavior after worker interruption.
decisionTaken: Worker replay first reconciles governed objects without DocumentReference links via repairNoOrphanRecordingIngest before fetching again.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: It makes replay converge to the same evidence model instead of creating a second object or abandoning clinical audio.
operationalRisk: Repair relies on the governed object metadata being intact.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add a periodic repair worker if production object-storage audits find interrupted settlement windows.
